title: Little Old New York
writer: Harry Tugend, John L. Balderston, Rida Johnson Young
actors: Alice Faye, Fred MacMurray, Richard Greene
plot: Steamboat inventor Robert Fulton shows up in New York in 1807. Tavern keeper Pat O'Day believes in him, but her boyfriend doesn't. All seems lost after sailors, afraid of losing their jobs, burn his boat.
